skills.name: sentiment_ice_scanner
skills.description: 情绪冰点扫描器：基于价格位置(较20日高点跌>10%)、筹码结构(胜率<40%)、量能特征(成交量/20日均量<0.35)三维度识别情绪冰点信号
skills.creator: quant

skills.name: macro_filter_layer

skills.creator: quant
